overall.description: Grand Theft Auto V gameplay depicting a wet urban intersection at night. A player character stands at the corner briefly before walking away, leaving a stationary view of moderate traffic flowing through the intersection under streetlights and an illuminated billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner at wet intersection

events.description: player character turns left and walks out of frame toward the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: player character stands at intersection corner observing traffic, then walks left and exits the frame

entered.detail: large rectangular digital billboard displaying colorful advertisement above the intersection
traffic light pole with red signal illuminated
traffic light pole with red signal illuminated
group of palm trees lining the right side of the street
tall street lamp illuminating the intersection corner
modern glass and concrete building visible behind the trees

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a wet urban intersection at night, with an illuminated billboard towering above. The player character stands at the corner near a street lamp, then turns and walks left out of the frame, leaving the intersection view. Traffic signals show red lights while palm trees line the distant right side.

events.description: silver sedan enters from right and drives through the wet intersection
red sports car speeds through the intersection from right to left
white sedan crosses the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of intersection traffic from the sidewalk corner, positioned just out of frame to the left

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from right to left with headlights on
red sports car speeding through the intersection, passing the camera view

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed at the intersection corner, capturing the flow of traffic through the wet streets. Various vehicles including sedans and sports cars drive through the intersection under the glow of streetlights and the overhead billboard. The traffic lights remain red as cars navigate the slick asphalt surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary view of a rain-slicked urban intersection at night that shifts from a character-focused moment to a pure observation of city traffic. It begins with a player character standing beneath a street lamp near a towering illuminated billboard before they turn and walk left, exiting the frame. As the character disappears, the focus expands to the wider intersection where red traffic signals cast a glow over the wet asphalt. The scene then settles into a steady observation of the environment, capturing various sedans and sports cars as they navigate the slick streets under the persistent light of the overhead billboard and street lamps.
